title: Project Hytale
description: A modpack made to be like Hytale
body:
🌍 Project Hytale

A Hytale-inspired modpack, rebuilt in Minecraft.

Project Hytale is a carefully selected Fabric modpack designed to recreate the feel, systems, and atmosphere of Hytale as closely as possible within Minecraft.

If you’ve ever wanted to play Hytale in Minecraft, this is the Modpack you want!

✨ Core Features
🗺️ World & Exploration

Rich, layered terrain with caves, cliffs, and biomes designed for exploration

Handpicked structures, ruins, and points of interest

Exploration feels rewarding without overwhelming the world

⚔️ Adventure & Combat

Improved combat feel and responsiveness

Dungeon focused progression instead of pure survival grind like default MC

🎨 Visual Style (No Shaders Required/Optional)

Stylized resource packs that replicate a Hytale like look

Enhanced lighting, water, foliage, and ambience

Shader-like visuals without the FPS cost

⚙️ Performance-First Design

Heavy use of Fabric optimization mods

Tuned simulation distances and configs to avoid TPS lag

Designed to run smoothly even with the large mod count

NOTE: This pack is CPU- and TPS-heavy, not just “throw RAM at it”.

🎯 Design Planning

Mirror Hytale: nothing more, nothing less.

No random mods

No Extras that don’t exist in Hytale

No overcomplicated mods

Everything included serves the Hytale vision.

🧩 Technical Info

Minecraft: 1.21.8

Loader: Fabric (ONLY)

Optimized for singleplayer and multiplayer

No shaders required (optional)

❗ Minimum Settings

To get the Minimum experience:

Simulation Distance: 5–6

View Distance: 6-8

Allocate 2–4 GB RAM (more is recommended!)

⚠️ Recommended Settings

To get the intended experience:

Simulation Distance: 6-8

View Distance: 10–12

Allocate 6–8 GB RAM (more is unnecessary)
